# CE.SDK v1.43 Release Notes

Customize your Android Editor to fit your workflow! Easily rearrange the dock and inspector for a more efficient, responsive editing experience.

[Nes Dogan](https://img.ly/blog/author/neslihan/)

#### On this Page

Welcome to CE.SDK v1.43! This update brings you enhanced customization tools, allowing you to tailor the interface of your Android Editor to fit your workflow. With new possibilities for mobile configurations, youГўВҖВҷll enjoy a more flexible and responsive user experience. LetГўВҖВҷs dive into what's new!

## Shape Your Interface Around Your Workflow

WeГўВҖВҷre excited to introduce powerful new ways to customize your Editor on Android . Easily configure your dock and inspectorГўВҖВ”giving you the flexibility to design a more personalized, responsive user experience!

Г°ВҹВ’ВЎ The dock is where you keep essential tools for quick access, while the inspector provides detailed controls and settings for the selected item. What's New:

Rearrange Your Dock  Move and remove dock items freely while keeping your custom settings intact, like button height.

Smart Custom Buttons  For a more responsive workflow, add buttons that dynamically appear, change, or disappear based on your workflowГўВҖВ”adapting to selected tools or active tasks.

Real-Time Updates  The dock updates in real-time, instantly reflecting changes to icons or visibility and adapting seamlessly to your workflow.

More customization options are coming soon! This update will be available on iOS shortly. Get started with our docs for [Inspector](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/android/user-interface/customization/inspector-bar-8ca1cd/?ref=img.ly#inspectorbaritem-configuration/?utm_source=imgly&utm_medium=blog&utm_campaign=releasenotes) and [Dock Configuration](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/android/user-interface/customization/dock-cb916c/?ref=img.ly#dock-configuration/?utm_source=imgly&utm_medium=blog&utm_campaign=releasenotes) .

## Control How Images Fit into Blocks

This web feature is perfect for customizing how images appear in designs and templates, allowing for more precise control. With Fill  Mode for images, you can choose from three options:

- Crop: Resizes and may crop the image to fill the block.
- Cover: The image fully covers the block while remaining centered both vertically and horizontally.
- Fit: Scales the image to fit within the block without cropping, leaving space if necessary.

Control this via API, with details in our [documentation](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/js/edit-image/transform/crop-f67a47/?ref=img.ly) .

## Upcoming

Streamline Your Video Editing Workflow

Our next release makes web video creation smoother than ever! You will be able to add multiple video clips within a single track on your timeline, keeping your workspace organized and efficient. No more juggling extra tracksГўВҖВ”just a clean, intuitive editing experience that lets you focus on bringing your vision to life.

View the [Changelog](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/changelog/?ref=img.ly#v1430--january-21st-2025/?utm_source=imgly&utm_medium=blog&utm_campaign=releasenotes) . Thanks for reading!

# CE.SDK v1.44 Release Notes

Create dynamic content with ease ГўВҖВ“ with multiple clips per track for video editing. Customize your Android Editor with Canvas UI to match your workflow.

[Nes Dogan](https://img.ly/blog/author/neslihan/)

#### On this Page

Welcome to CE.SDK v1.44 ! This release brings a range of updates designed to enhance your editing workflow across platforms. Enjoy more vibrant and true-to-life visuals with expanded P3 color support on iOS and Android. On the web, streamline your editing process with the new ability to add multiple clips per track, making timeline management more efficient.

LetГўВҖВҷs dive into the updates!

## Simplify Your Video Editing Workflow

Add multiple clips to a single track on your video timeline! With CE.SDK video editing for the web , you can insert video clips, text, overlays, and more on one trackГўВҖВ”resulting in a more organized and efficient workspace.

This update empowers you to create richer, more dynamic sequences while keeping your timeline neat and easy to navigate.

Maximize Efficiency  Simplicity and speed are key. By reducing the need for multiple tracks, this feature helps users to work smarter and fasterГўВҖВ”allowing them to focus on creative storytelling and deliver engaging content.

Get started with our Video Editing for Web [documentation](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/js/prebuilt-solutions/video-editor-9e533a/?utm_source=imgly&utm_medium=blog&utm_campaign=releasenotes) .

## Get Vibrant Colors with P3/Wide Gamut Support

Unlock a broader color range with P3 color space support on iOS and Android devices. This enhancement ensures your designs and content are more vibrant, accurate, and true to lifeГўВҖВ”giving you richer color options for all your projects.

Set up color spaces with our documentation for [iOS](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/ios/open-the-editor/uri-resolver-36b624/?language=swift&platform=ios&ref=img.ly#editorapicheckp3support/?utm_source=imgly&utm_medium=blog&utm_campaign=releasenotes) and [Android](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/android/open-the-editor/uri-resolver-36b624/?language=kotlin&platform=android&ref=img.ly#working-in-different-color-spaceshttps://img.ly/docs/cesdk/engine/api/editor-utils?language=swift&platform=ios#editorapicheckp3support/?utm_source=imgly&utm_medium=blog&utm_campaign=releasenotes) .

## Tailor the Android Canvas Menu to Your Workflows

Г°ВҹВ’ВЎ The Canvas menu appears when you select a design block, letting you edit its settings, like duplicating a selected image.

Building on mobile configuration introduced in our [last release](https://img.ly/blog/creative-editor-sdk-v-1-43-0-release-notes/?utm_source=imgly&utm_medium=blog&utm_campaign=releasenotes) , weГўВҖВҷve extended customization to the editor Canvas Menu for Android. This update gives you full control over how the menu and its items appear and behave in the editor:

- Customization: Configure visibility, transition effects, and decoration. Adjust the style of the divider between buttons.
- Item List Control: Modify, add, reorder, or hide menu items.
- Flexible Button and Divider Configuration: Adjust button appearance, functionality, and divider styles to match your design requirements.

More customizations will be available soon, including for iOS.  Explore the [documentation](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/android/user-interface/customization/canvas-menu-0d2b5b/?ref=img.ly) .

## Improvements

Switch the Editor Language without Restarting

Easily switch languages in our web editor without restarting it. This update lets you update the UI language instantly via API, streamlining localization. Check our [documentation](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/js/user-interface/localization-508e20/?ref=img.ly#i18n-apihttps://img.ly/docs/cesdk/engine/api/editor-utils?language=kotlin&platform=android#working-in-different-color-spaceshttps://img.ly/docs/cesdk/engine/api/editor-utils?language=swift&platform=ios#editorapicheckp3support/?utm_source=imgly&utm_medium=blog&utm_campaign=releasenotes) , and translate right away!

## Upcoming

Record Reactions to Videos on Android  We're excited to announce that Reactions will soon be available on Android. Already live in CE.SDK on iOS, this featureГўВҖВ”popularized by platforms like TikTok and InstagramГўВҖВ”allows users to capture and share their real-time responses to videos. Enhance engagement and provide content creators with immediate, interactive feedback, making your video content even more dynamic.

# CE.SDK v1.45 Release Notes

Create, Engage & Build Seamlessly! This release brings Reactions to Android. Record authentic responses to a video.

[Nes Dogan](https://img.ly/blog/author/neslihan/)

#### On this Page

Welcome to CE.SDK v1.45! WeГўВҖВҷre expanding creative possibilities and refining the editing experience. Reactions are now available on Android, enabling users to record, edit, and personalize real-time responses.

We also introduce improvements like smoother development with TypeScript and better text rendering across languages.

These solutions help creators and developers work smarter, engage better, and deliver high-quality content.

## Record Reactions to Videos on Android

Now available on Android , the popular Reactions feature lets users record and add their real-time responses to videos.

This is a must-have for engagement-driven content, mirroring interactions on platforms like TikTok and Instagram. Reactions have become a key element of personal branding and connecting with other creators on social media. With Reactions, users can:

- Connect with their audienceГўВҖВ”duet, respond to trends, or join conversations.
- Add a personal touchГўВҖВ”react to fan art, viral moments, or inspiring videos.
- Show thought leadershipГўВҖВ”comment on user questions, industry news, or niche topics.
- Increase reachГўВҖВ”boost visibility and interaction.
- Monetize contentГўВҖВ”sell products and showcase collaborations.

Reactions make content creation fast, easy, and personal.

With our shipped UI, users can select a vertical or horizontal layout to record their reaction video, then customize it with text, filters, adjustments, and more.

ItГўВҖВҷs easy to crop, trim, and further adjust your video clipГўВҖВ”providing a flexible starting point for seamless editing.

Try the [live demo](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=ly.img.cesdk.catalog&hl=gsw&ref=img.ly) and enable Reactions for Android with our [documentation](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/android/import-media/capture-from-camera/camera-configuration-46afd0/?ref=img.ly) .

## Improvements

### Ensure Text Rendering Across Languages

When a glyph is unavailable in the selected font, CE.SDK automatically falls back to a configurable default font. This prevents localization issues and ensures seamless text rendering, perfect for your global projects.

### Simplify Development with Complete TypeScript Support

WeГўВҖВҷve improved TypeScript  support by exposing previously missing types used in our UI APIs. This enhancement, based on user feedback, reduces complexity and ensures smoother development workflows.

View the [Changelog](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/changelog/?ref=img.ly#v1450--february-19th-2025) . Thanks for reading!

3,000+ creative professionals gain early access to new features and updatesГўВҖВ”don't miss out, and [subscribe](https://share.hsforms.com/1IgAOV1wASXGPnFG4ZPLejg1hk3i?ref=img.ly) to our newsletter.


[Source](https://img.ly/blog/creative-editor-sdk-v-1-46-0-release-notes/)

# CE.SDK v1.46 Release Notes

This release gives you full control over the iOS dock and inspector bar, letting you customize actions and buttons for a faster, more intuitive editing experience.

[Nes Dogan](https://img.ly/blog/author/neslihan/)

#### On this Page

Welcome to a new release! CE.SDK v1.46 introduces a more flexible and intuitive user interface for iOS, allowing you to optimize your workflow with a customizable dock and inspector. Read on for upcoming features.

## Shape Your iOS Interface Around Your Workflow

We unlock full dock and inspector bar customization , giving you the flexibility to optimize your workflow. With an open API, you can now tailor these UI elements to better suit your editing needsГўВҖВ”whether by reordering actions, adding custom functionality, or simplifying the interface.

Take control of your interface by modifying both the dock and inspector bar :

- Rearrange & Customize Actions ГўВҖВ“ Prioritize your most-used tools by reordering or removing actions to create a cleaner, more efficient workspace.
- Add Custom Buttons & Views ГўВҖВ“ Extend functionality by integrating custom buttons or views that trigger specific actions, such as opening an asset library or displaying additional information.

These enhancements provide a seamless, intuitive editing experience that adapts to your unique workflow needs.

# CE.SDK v1.47 Release Notes

Boost iOS performance with enhanced memory management, seamless transcoding, and background processing for a smoother editing experience.

[Nes Dogan](https://img.ly/blog/author/neslihan/)

#### On this Page

WeГўВҖВҷre thrilled to roll out the latest updates in CE.SDK v1.47! This release boosts performance and refines the video editing experience on iOS. With enhanced memory management, faster transcoding, and seamless background processing, your users can now edit and create without interruptions, even with larger files.

HereГўВҖВҷs whatГўВҖВҷs new:

# Edit Large Videos with Optimized Performance

Editing large videos on iOS is now more seamless than ever. Previously, videos were fully loaded into memory, sometimes doubling usage due to background processing. Now, you can work with significantly reduced memory consumption.

A reduced memory footprint improves stability, prevents slowdowns, and ensures a smoother experienceГўВҖВ”especially for locally stored videos.

This update enhances user satisfaction and retention by enabling smoother editing, keeping consumers engaged with a seamless experience.

# Upcoming

Keep Editing While Videos Transcode in the Background (iOS)  Seamless background video transcoding keeps your iOS app fast and interactive. Video transcoding on iOS will happen in the backgroundГўВҖВ”without blocking the UI, allowing users to continue editing smoothly.

This update will improve app responsiveness, minimize disruptions, and ensure a consistent experience for all imported videos, leading to higher user satisfaction and engagement.

Boost Engagement and Accessibility with Video Captions  Captions are essential in todayГўВҖВҷs social media landscape, where videos often autoplay on mute and clear messaging is key. Our upcoming Video  Captions for Web will allow you to:

- Manually add subtitles to videos or upload an SRT file.
- Adjust timing and formatting in an intuitive interface to match your brandГўВҖВҷs style.
- Embed captions directly into videos, ensuring they remain visible across all platforms.

Stay tunedГўВҖВ”Captions are coming soon!

View all bug fixes and changes in the [Changelog](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/changelog/?ref=img.ly#v1470--march-20th-2025) . Thanks for reading!

3,000+ creative professionals gain early access to new features and updatesГўВҖВ”don't miss out, and [subscribe](https://share.hsforms.com/1IgAOV1wASXGPnFG4ZPLejg1hk3i?ref=img.ly) to our newsletter.

# CE.SDK v1.48 Release Notes

WeГўВҖВҷre expanding UI customization for CE.SDK on AndroidГўВҖВ”now you can tailor the navigation bar to match your brand and streamline your design workflows.

[Nes Dogan](https://img.ly/blog/author/neslihan/)

#### On this Page

This release makes it easier than ever to tailor the Android editing experience to your brand. Customize the navigation bar to guide your users seamlessly and create an interface that feels uniquely yours.

LetГўВҖВҷs jump in:

## Match Your Navigation Bar With Your Design & Logic

You now have more control over customizing the navigation bar on Android , ensuring that it reflects your brand and optimizes user flows.

Key Features:

- Add Custom Buttons: You can add custom buttons to the navigation bar, to give users quick access to frequently used actions.
- Rearrange Buttons: Arrange buttons in your navigation bar.
- Integrate Custom Components: Customize the navigation bar by integrating unique elements that fit your app's design and functionality.

These updates allow you to fully tailor the mobile editing experience to your specific needs.

Г°ВҹВ’ВЎ Did you know? In our previous update, we introduced customizability for the [dock](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/android/user-interface/customization/dock-cb916c/?ref=img.ly) and [inspector](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/android/user-interface/customization/inspector-bar-8ca1cd/?ref=img.ly) bar on AndroidГўВҖВ”laying the foundation for more UI personalization.

WeГўВҖВҷre continuing that momentum by giving you full control over the navigation bar, ensuring that every part of your mobile editing experience can align with your productГўВҖВҷs workflow.

Start customizing your navigation bar with our [documentation](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/android/user-interface/customization/navigation-bar-4e5d39/?ref=img.ly) .

## Upcoming

Enjoy Vibrant HDR Videos  CE.SDK will support loading HDR videos on iOS, converting them to SDR on the fly for accurate and vibrant color representationГўВҖВ”without the need for time-consuming transcoding.

Previously, HDR videos needed to be transcoded with delaysГўВҖВ”especially with large 4K videos. Soon, HDR content is processed instantly . Videos appear with correct color fidelity right away, making the editing experience more fluid and visually accurate for users.

This enhancement will remove friction in the editing workflow and lets your users start working with their content immediately. By offering a smoother, higher-quality experience, your app can boost user engagement and retention.

View all bug fixes and changes in the [Changelog](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/changelog/?ref=img.ly#v1480--april-1st-2025) . Thanks for reading!

# CE.SDK v1.49 Release Notes

Bring more motion and emotion to your designs with GIF Support, Ken Burns Animation!

[Nes Dogan](https://img.ly/blog/author/neslihan/)

#### On this Page

Get ready to add more motion and emotion to your designs! From fully integrated GIF Support to the cinematic Ken Burns animation and polished text background on iOS, this update packs features that elevate storytelling and enhance visual impact. LetГўВҖВҷs dive in!

## Use GIFs in Your Designs on Web and Mobile

GIFs are now fully integrated into the CE.SDK UI. Add and manage animated images like any other media asset. Drop a GIF into your timeline to play it once , or create a loop by extending its duration. YouГўВҖВҷre in control.

This update delivers a consistent experience across Web and Mobile, empowering dynamic content creation for social media, marketing, and beyond.

Getting Started:   GIF support itself is built-inГўВҖВ”no setup required.  However, to add looping, enable the looping option in your assets. Find platform-specific guidance in our docs:

- Web
- iOS
- Android

## Add A Cinematic Ken Burns Animation

Give your images a cinematic touch with the new crop-zoom animation in CE.SDK. Inspired by the Ken Burns effect , this feature lets you smoothly pan and zoom across images, creating dynamic storytelling without complex editing.

Apply the Ken Burns animation directly from the CE.SDK animation library on the web. Learn [how to use animations](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/js/animation/overview-6a2ef2/?ref=img.ly) and [their properties](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/js/animation/types-4e5f41/?ref=img.ly) with our documentation.

## Add Text Backgrounds on iOS

Make your text pop! Apply solid color backgrounds to text on iOS. Additionally, adjust the padding and rounded corners of your text background.

This feature ensures readability and adds a polished, professional touch to your designs. By elevating text design, your app helps users create visually compelling content that stands out. Available for Web and iOS, soon on Android!

Get started with our [text background documentation](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/ios/text/styling-269c48/?ref=img.ly#text-background) for iOS.

## Improvements

Speed Up Your HDR Video Editing

We've dramatically accelerated HDR-to-SDR video conversion in CE.SDK on iOS . While HDR videos previously required lengthy processing, especially for 4K content, they now convert to SDR with minimal delay, letting users start editing their footage faster than ever before.

Stay tuned: Smooth HDR-to-SDR conversion will also be available for Web with CE.SDK v1.50.

## Upcoming

Boost Engagement and Accessibility with Captions

Captions are essential in todayГўВҖВҷs social media landscape, where videos often autoplay on mute and clear messaging is key. Our upcoming Captions for Web feature will allow you to:

- Manually add subtitles to videos or upload an SRT file for seamless integration.
- Adjust timing and formatting in an intuitive interface to match your brandГўВҖВҷs style.
- Embed captions directly into videos, ensuring they remain visible across all platforms.

Thanks for reading! View all bug fixes and changes in the [Changelog](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/changelog/?ref=img.ly#v1490--april-16th-2025) .

# CE.SDK v1.51 Release Notes

Make it pop! Animations and text backgrounds are now available on Android. Plus, weГўВҖВҷre excited to introduce Camera for Flutter and other great updates.

[Nes Dogan](https://img.ly/blog/author/neslihan/)

#### On this Page

Welcome back to a fresh CE.SDK release. This update brings scroll-stopping animations and text backgrounds to your Android app. On iOS, you can now customize the navigation bar to match your brand and workflows. Flutter developers, weГўВҖВҷve also got great news for you: Our CE.SDK Camera is now available for your Flutter app.

LetГўВҖВҷs dive in!

## Add Engaging Animations to Designs on Android

Add dynamic motion to your text and design elements with CE.SDK for Android. Our new Text & Block Animations feature delivers a comprehensive library of motion effects. This release also ships with a smoothly animated, categorized user interface.

Comprehensive Animation Library   Access a full suite of in, out, and loop animationsГўВҖВ”mirroring the capabilities of our animation for [web](https://img.ly/showcases/cesdk/animations/web?utm_source=imgly&utm_medium=blog&utm_campaign=releasenotes) .

Tailored Motion Controls  Fine-tune animations like duration, easing, direction, and more. For text, you can also control how exactly it animates ГўВҖВ” for example, as an entire block or individual characters!

Get started with our Animation [documentation](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/android/animation-ce900c/?utm_source=imgly&utm_medium=blog&utm_campaign=releasenotes) .  Try it live on our [demo app](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=ly.img.cesdk.catalog&ref=img.ly) .

## Make Text Stand Out on Android

Add backgrounds to text blocks for better readability and visual polish. Customize padding and corner radius for a clean, consistent look. Ideal for short-form videos and social media content where clear messaging matters.

## Add a Camera to Your Flutter App

We're excited to announce the expansion of our Camera to Flutter, enabling seamless integration of advanced camera features into your app.

Camera Key Features:

- Simultaneous Recording: Record multiple video clips and use a timer.
- Reactions: Empower users to remix and create engaging content on iOS & Android. A loved format popularized by platforms like Instagram and TikTok.

This release brings feature parity across iOS, Android, React Native, and now Flutter, ensuring a consistent developer experience across platforms.

Get started with our Flutter Mobile Camera [documentation](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/flutter/import-media/capture-from-camera-92f388/?utm_source=imgly&utm_medium=blog&utm_campaign=releasenotes) .

## Match Your Navigation Bar With Your Brand & Workflow

You now have more control over customizing the navigation bar on iOS , ensuring that it reflects your brand and optimizes user flows.

- Customize & Rearrange Buttons: You can add custom buttons to the navigation bar, customize, and rearrange them.
- Integrate Custom Components: Customize the navigation bar by integrating unique elements that fit your app's design and functionality.

Tailor your mobile editing experience to your needs. Get started with our [documentation](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/android/user-interface/customization/navigation-bar-4e5d39/?ref=img.ly) .

Thanks for reading! View all bug fixes and changes in the [Changelog](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/changelog/?ref=img.ly#v1510--may-19th-2025) .

# CE.SDK v1.54 Release Notes

Speed up editing and deliver perfect, platform-ready visuals with Crop & Resize Presets for iOS!

[Nes Dogan](https://img.ly/blog/author/neslihan/)

#### On this Page

Your users love it! WeГўВҖВҷre bringing Crop & Resize Presets to iOS, first introduced for web in our [last release](https://img.ly/blog/ce-sdk-v1-53-release-notes/) . This update removes a common time-sink in design workflows and ensures visual consistency across channels.

## Get Platform-Ready Content Fast with Crop & Resize Presets (iOS)

Your iOS users can now apply crop and resize presets. This ensures precise, repeatable aspect ratios and sizes across all projects. Presets help users speeding up editing and deliver perfectly formatted assets for popular platforms & mediums.

Quickly resize designs for any platform, tweak, and publish fast.

- A new text style dropdown makes switching styles easier.
- Stroke settings are now neatly grouped in a dropdown.
- Advanced text controls are now directly accessible from the inspector.
- The canvas bar now includes a dropdown with key actions: Copy, Paste, Flip Horizontally, and Flip Vertically.

Use Crop & Resize Presets on Android  Bring fast, easy formatting to Android! With our next release, your users can apply presets across all platforms.

# CE.SDK v1.55 Release Notes

Boost video engagement! Your users can now add captions to videos on the web.

[Nes Dogan](https://img.ly/blog/author/neslihan/)

#### On this Page

We are rolling out powerful updates that increase video engagement and simplify content creation. Your users can now add captions to videos. Android supports crop and resize presets for quick, consistent formatting. Plus, the user interface is smoother and more intuitive. LetГўВҖВҷs jump in!

# Boost Video Engagement with Captions

Add captions to videos on the Web and Engine ! Your users can create closed captions manually using a simple interface with timestamps, or upload a caption file ( .srt , .vtt ).

This feature ships with animated style presets for clean, professional-looking captions. Of course, you can [add custom presets](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/js/create-video/update-caption-presets-e9c385/?ref=img.ly) for captions to match your brand.

From short-form video to e-learning, captions have become a standard in content creation. They are essential for creating accessible and high-performing videos. According to Meta, captions can increase video view time by 12% on average. This is a feature your users expect and rely on.

Explore the Captions [documentation](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/js/edit-video/add-captions-f67565/?ref=img.ly) or try the [demo](https://img.ly/showcases/cesdk/video-captions/web?ref=img.ly) .

# Design Faster with Crop & Resize Presets on Android

Bring fast & easy formatting to Android users with crop and resize presets.

Easy Cropping

Instantly crop to popular aspect ratios for social media platforms, and more. This saves time and ensures every creation fits the channel or print use-case perfectly.

Resize Designs with Presets

Resize entire designs, tweak, and publish fast. Pixel-perfect with presets for social media platforms.

Crop & Resize presets are now supported for Web, iOS, and Android apps.  Explore [Crop](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/android/user-interface/customization/crop-presets-f94f26/?ref=img.ly) and [Page Format](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/android/user-interface/customization/page-format-496315/?ref=img.ly) documentation.  View the Android [demo app](https://apps.apple.com/de/app/img-ly-design-editor/id1672991141?ref=img.ly) .

# Improvements

New Loading Animation for Sources

Animated overlays clearly show that sources like videos are loading. Especially helpful during longer tasks such as AI video generation, these indicators reduce uncertainty and improve the overall user experience without interrupting workflow.

Thanks for reading! Read the full [changelog](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/changelog/v1-55-0/?ref=img.ly) .

# CE.SDK v1.56 Release Notes

Translate the editor and camera UI, start every project with a crop mode, and spark creativity with refreshed default assets.

[Nes Dogan](https://img.ly/blog/author/neslihan/)

#### On this Page

CE.SDK 1.56 brings major updates for editing control and customization: translate the editor and camera UI on mobile for a smooth experience in any language! This release also adds Force Crop to guarantee every project starts in the right format. WeГўВҖВҷve refreshed our default asset library to jumpstart creativity.

LetГўВҖВҷs see whatГўВҖВҷs new!

## Translate Your Mobile Editor and Camera

You can now localize CE.SDK on iOS and Android , making it easy to translate the editor and camera UI for a great experience in any language.

Translate Your Editor   Reach global audiences and meet local expectations with minimal effort! All visible UI elements in the editor can now be localized.

Simplified Text Customization  Easily override our default labels and messages by using a clear, structured system.

Camera SDK Localization  Not only our editors: CE.SDK Camera supports localization, too. Configure it separately using the [iOS Camera](https://ubique.img.ly/develop/documentation/ios/import-media/capture-from-camera/camera-configuration-46afd0/?ref=img.ly#localization) and [Android Camera documentation](https://ubique.img.ly/develop/documentation/android/import-media/capture-from-camera/camera-configuration-46afd0/?ref=img.ly) .

Explore the documentation to [localize on iOS](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/ios/user-interface/localization-508e20/?ref=img.ly) and [Android](https://ubique.img.ly/develop/documentation/android/user-interface/localization-508e20/?ref=img.ly) .

## Start Every Edit with a Crop

[demo](https://img.ly/showcases/cesdk/force-crop/web?ref=img.ly)

Configure whether images must be cropped before editing. With Force Crop , you set the aspect ratio or format for your usersГўВҖВҷ project.

Three modes give you full control:

- Always ГўВҖВ“ The editor opens in crop mode, and users crop before they can edit.
- If Needed ГўВҖВ“ Users see crop mode only if the image doesnГўВҖВҷt fit the required format.
- Silent ГўВҖВ“ The preset format is applied automatically, without showing the crop step.

This ensures every project starts in the right formatГўВҖВ”whether itГўВҖВҷs for Instagram Stories, avatars, YouTube Shorts, or product imagesГўВҖВ”without leaving room for user error.

Force Crop is supported for Web and our Engine.  Get started with the Force Crop [documentation](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/js/user-interface/customization/force-crop-c2854e/?ref=img.ly) and [demo](https://img.ly/showcases/cesdk/force-crop/web?ref=img.ly) .

## Improvements

Richer BuiltГўВҖВ‘In Asset Library

WeГўВҖВҷve overhauled the default assets in CE.SDK to make it easier for your users to start creating with quality content right away.

- Shapes now include gradient and image fills, plus outline options for more design flexibility.
- Text comes with curated font combinations for quick, polished typography.
- Stickers have been refreshed to provide a more meaningful starter set.

This update means you can ship your app with readyГўВҖВ‘toГўВҖВ‘use creative assets.

Thanks for reading! Explore the complete [v1.56 Changelog](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/changelog/v1-56-0/?ref=img.ly) .

# CE.SDK v1.57 Release Notes

This release boosts stability and memory handling on iOS, plus updates mobile asset libraries with fresh shapes, stickers, and font combos.

[Nes Dogan](https://img.ly/blog/author/neslihan/)

#### On this Page

This release features under-the-hood improvements focused on stability, memory management, and overall performance, particularly for iOS.

Additionally, weГўВҖВҷve enhanced the mobile experience with a refreshed built-in asset library on iOS and Android, featuring new shapes, stickers, and curated font combinations to help users design more easily. LetГўВҖВҷs dive in!

## Save Bigger Scenes, More Reliably on Mobile

Archiving complex projects with large assets can spike memory usage, causing performance issues or failures in some scenarios. To support more complex or asset-heavy scenes, weГўВҖВҷve improved how archive export works on iOS and Android.

This update reduces memory load and helps your app save larger projects more efficiently and reliably.

## Design Faster with Fresh Mobile Assets

WeГўВҖВҷve overhauled the iOS & Android default assets in CE.SDK. Let users start creating with inspiring design elements right away.

- Shapes now include gradient and image fills, plus ГўВҖВҳoutlineГўВҖВҷ shapes.
- Stickers have been refreshed to provide a more fun starter set.
- Text comes with curated font combinations for quick, polished typography.

[iOS demo app](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/img-ly-design-editor/id1672991141?ref=img.ly)

This update means you can ship your app with readyГўВҖВ‘toГўВҖВ‘use creative tools. Less setup work for you, and more engaging options for your end users.

Thanks for reading! Explore the complete [v1.57 Changelog](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/changelog/v1-57-0/?ref=img.ly) .

# CE.SDK v1.59 Release Notes

This release brings full editors to React & Vue in minutes, WebM support, and sharper image handling.

[Nes Dogan](https://img.ly/blog/author/neslihan/)

#### On this Page

This release makes building with CE.SDK smoother than ever: embed editors in minutes with React & Vue wrappers, get WebM video support, and enjoy sharper visuals with improved image scaling.

# Work with WebM Video Files

CE.SDK for Web and our Engine now support WebM videos. Supported codecs include VP8, VP9, and AV1. This allows you to handle more video formats efficiently, deliver faster-loading videos, and ensure smooth playback across browsers and platforms.

ГўВҶВ’ Explore all [supported formats](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/js/conversion/overview-44dc58/?ref=img.ly#supported-input-and-output-formats) in our documentation.

# Add a Full-Featured Editor to React or Vue in Minutes

CE.SDK now ships React and Vue wrappers directly in the @cesdk/cesdk-js package. Just install, import, and skip lengthy setups.

Get prebuilt editors and smart features out of the box. This frees your team to ship faster and focus on what makes your app unique in the market.

Browse pre-built solutions for [React](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/react/prebuilt-solutions-d0ed07/?ref=img.ly) and [Vue](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/vue/prebuilt-solutions-d0ed07/?ref=img.ly) .

### What You Get Out of The Box

All-in-one integration  With wrappers included, installation is cleaner and simplified. Simply install and import the necessary components.

Prebuilt Editor Solutions  Our wrappers provide ready-to-use editor components. Perfect for rapid prototyping or embedding full-featured editing experiences.

Rich Editing Features  Use built-in support for photo & video editing (crop, filters, adjustments), smart AI tools, template creation, asset libraries. Customize the UI if needed.

ГўВҶВ’  [Get started with React](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/react/get-started/overview-e18f40/?ref=img.ly)   ГўВҶВ’  [Get started with Vue](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/vue/get-started/overview-e18f40/?ref=img.ly)

# Improvements

Keep Images Crisp Without Accidental Upscaling  When you add a bitmap image to your canvas, CE.SDK now ensures it isnГўВҖВҷt placed larger than its original size. This prevents low-res images from being upscaled automatically and looking blurry, while still letting users enlarge them manually if they choose.

Thanks for reading! Explore the complete [v1.59 Changelog](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/changelog/v1-59-0/?ref=img.ly) ( [1.59.1](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/changelog/v1-59-1/?ref=img.ly) ).

# CE.SDK v1.60 Release Notes

This release brings iOS 26 readiness, Lottie animations, MKV video, more editor theming options, and smoother workflows for developers.

[Nes Dogan](https://img.ly/blog/author/neslihan/)

#### On this Page

This release delivers more flexible and future-ready solutions. CE.SDK v1.60 introduces support for Lottie and MKV files, enhanced color options, Angular integration, and future-proof updates for iOS 26 ГўВҖВ” alongside improvements for streamlined CE.SDK customization and developer experience.

LetГўВҖВҷs dive in!

## Add Motion With Lottie Files

Our Engine now supports .json Lottie files as video fills. Add lightweight, scalable animations to video projects without large asset sizes.

ГўВҶВ’ Explore all [supported formats](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/js/conversion/overview-44dc58/?ref=img.ly#supported-input-and-output-formats) in our documentation.

## Work With MKV Video Formats

CE.SDK now supports MKV (Matroska) files, including H.264, H.265/HEVC, AAC, and MP3 alongside VP8, VP9, AV1, and Opus. More uploads work out of the box, reducing friction for your users.

## Stay Flexible with iOS 26

AppleГўВҖВҷs new Liquid Glass design system in iOS 26 changes safe-area handling, toolbar sizing, and system banners. CE.SDK v1.60 prepares you for this shift: choose whether to embrace the new look or preserve your current layout.

By default, when you build against the iOS 26 SDK , our editor automatically uses the new system visuals and behaviors for seamless alignment with AppleГўВҖВҷs latest design language.

If you continue building with a preГўВҖВ“iOS 26 SDK, nothing changes: your app continues to look and behave as before, and our SDK maintains the previous experience.

If you want to build with the iOS 26 SDK but temporarily keep the classic UI , Apple provides an Info.plist switch: UIDesignRequiresCompatibility to enable UI [compatibility mode](https://developer.apple.com/documentation/BundleResources/Information-Property-List/UIDesignRequiresCompatibility?ref=img.ly) .

When this is present, your app wonГўВҖВҷt adopt Liquid Glass, and our SDK will mirror that choice to remain consistent with the rest of your app.

Note: Apple hasnГўВҖВҷt published a deprecation date for this compatibility key; plan your migration accordingly.

Resources:  ГўВҶВ’ [Apple Documentation - Liquid Glass Introduction](https://developer.apple.com/documentation/TechnologyOverviews/liquid-glass?ref=img.ly)  ГўВҶВ’ [Apple Documentation - Adopting Liquid Glass](https://developer.apple.com/documentation/TechnologyOverviews/adopting-liquid-glass?ref=img.ly)

### More iOS Improvements

This release also brings the new PhotoRoll integration, replacing the legacy uploads tab with direct access to the system photo library. Alongside this, we prepared the NavigationBar for AppleГўВҖВҷs updated design, improved accessibility with VoiceOver fixes, adjusted search behavior for Liquid Glass, and resolved audio playback issues after recording with the system camera.

## Switch Editor Theme Instantly, Match System Settings

CE.SDK for Web now adapts to your usersГўВҖВҷ system settings out of the box. A new system theme option automatically switches between light and dark mode. Because theming works at runtime , you donГўВҖВҷt need to reload the editor to apply changes ГўВҖВ” making it easier to deliver seamless experiences.

ГўВҶВ’ Explore [Theming documentation](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/js/api/cesdk-js/classes/userinterfaceapi/?ref=img.ly#settheme) .

## Deliver Accurate UI Colors With P3 and OKLCH

Our [Theming API](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/js/user-interface/appearance/theming-4b0938/?ref=img.ly) lets you style the web editorГўВҖВҷs user interface ГўВҖВ” toolbars, panels, and other elements ГўВҖВ” so it matches your brand. In CE.SDK v1.60, theming now supports the P3 color space and OKLCH color format , giving you modern, more accurate colors for your editorГўВҖВҷs UI. This ensures branded themes look vibrant and consistent across todayГўВҖВҷs wide-gamut displays.

## Drop CE.SDK into Angular Apps with Ease

WeГўВҖВҷve added official Angular support via @cesdk/cesdk-js/angular , bringing the same plug-and-play experience developers already love in React and Vue.

ГўВҶВ’ Get started with [Angular documentation](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/angular/get-started/overview-e18f40/?ref=img.ly) .

## Enhanced Developer Experience

### Be Flexible When Handling Actions and Common Tasks

CE.SDK now introduces new Actions and Utils APIs that simplify how you manage editor workflows.

With the Actions API , tasks like save, export, load, or upload are managed centrally instead of across multiple places. This reduces repetition and makes it easier to customize how users interact with the editor.

The Utils API adds ready-to-use defaults for dialogs, file handling, exporting, and scene management. These save time and cut boilerplate while still letting you override behavior when needed.

ГўВҶВ’ Explore the [Actions API](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/js/actions-6ch24x?ref=img.ly) and [Utils API](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/js/api/cesdk-js/classes/utilsapi/?ref=img.ly) .

### Manage Settings in a Unified Place

With Settings API , weГўВҖВҷve consolidated the Settings interface and introduced unified setSetting and getSetting methods, replacing multiple type-specific methods. For developers, this means:

- Cleaner, more consistent API surface
- Easier to learn, easier to maintain
- Improved TypeScript support with automatic type inference

ГўВҶВ’ Explore [Settings API](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/js/settings-970c98/?ref=img.ly) documentation.

## Full Changelog

View the complete [Changelog v1.60](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/changelog/v1-60-0/?ref=img.ly) .

# CE.SDK v1.61 Release Notes

This release adds live animation previews for effortless motion design, video-speed control, and more refinements under the hood.

[Nes Dogan](https://img.ly/blog/author/neslihan/)

#### On this Page

This release brings instant animation previews, new playback-speed control for clips, and smoother audio handling on mobile. All aimed at making motion design and media playback more intuitive for your users and more reliable for your app.

LetГўВҖВҷs dive in!

## Preview Your Animations Instantly

CE.SDK now plays a live preview whenever you add or update an animation. Your users can immediately see how their animations behave without pressing ГўВҖВңplay,ГўВҖВқ making it faster to fine-tune motion and create polished results.

For your app, that means smoother editing workflows, less trial and error, and a more professional user experience out of the box.

ГўВҶВ’ [Try the Animation Demo for Web](https://img.ly/showcases/cesdk/animations/web?ref=img.ly) .

## Fine-Tune Playback Speed for Clips

Our CE.SDK engine now supports playback speed control for videos, GIFs, and audio. Developers can programmatically adjust speed using setPlaybackSpeed and getPlaybackSpeed .

ГўВҶВ’ [Explore the BlockAPI documentation](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/js/api/engine/classes/blockapi/?ref=img.ly#block-video) .

Preview: Adjust Video Speed in the Editor

Within our next releases, your users will be able to fine-tune video speed right inside the editor , using an intuitive user interface for the Web.

This will give creators more control over pacing and style, from slow-motion moments to fast-cut edits. Let users craft more dynamic, platform-ready content for social media without leaving your app.

## Improvements

Smarter Audio Handling Across Platforms  On iOS and Android, the audio device is now lazy-initialized . This means, it will activate only when audio starts playing. This reduces energy use and improves reliability after pauses or process restarts.

# CE.SDK v1.62 Release Notes

This release brings print-ready PDFs, a modernized look, smarter editing controls, and enhanced developer tools.

[Nes Dogan](https://img.ly/blog/author/neslihan/)

#### On this Page

This release introduces the Print-Ready PDF Plugin, a modernized editor theme, and editing control improvements. Empower your users to design with precision, export for print, or work more efficiently across media.

## Create Print-Ready PDFs

WeГўВҖВҷre excited to introduce the Print-Ready PDF Plugin for CE.SDK, enabling you to transform your designs into professional-grade PDFs.

Key Features

- PDF/X-3 Compliance for printing industry standards
- RGB ГўВҶВ’ CMYK Conversion for print color output
- ICC Profile Support for your custom profiles, or our shipped profiles
- Client-Side Processing ГўВҖВ” no backend needed

This plugin provides a straightforward solution for generating print-ready PDFs with your app. By handling the conversion client-side, it simplifies workflows and reduces reliance on external tools.

Getting Started:  ГўВҶВ’ [Integrate the Print-Ready PDF Plugin](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@imgly/plugin-print-ready-pdfs-web?ref=img.ly)  ГўВҶВ’ [View Print-Ready PDF Plugin Docs](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/js/plugins/print-ready-pdf-iroalu/?ref=img.ly)

## Design Faster in a Modern, Distraction-Free UI

The CE.SDK editor has a new look: simpler, brighter, and more focused. This visual refresh reduces complexity, improves readability, and helps your users design faster while keeping your product future-proof.

Friendlier and Easier-to-Use Interface:

- The editor now features a flatter UI appearance with size-consistent elements, including buttons and dropdowns, making it feel more intuitive and less "boxed-in."
- Increased font weight improves legibility.
- More rounded interfaces contribute to a friendlier and more inviting feel, especially for users who are not professional designers.
- A refined color palette provides better contrast.

Panels now visually step back, so designs take the spotlight. The result is an interface that feels balanced, and easy to use.

The new theming system is built for flexibility. It supports more straightforward customization and evolving brand identities, keeping your editor modern and consistent without constant redesigns.

ГўВҶВ’ [Explore the New Look (Demo](https://img.ly/showcases/cesdk/default-ui/web/standalone?ref=img.ly) )

## Export Audio for Captions, Editing, and Automation

The new exportAudio API supports extracting audio from scenes, audio blocks, or video fill blocks.

This gives developers full control over audio output for editing, mixing, or automation workflows. For example, you can extract audio for automatic transcription and auto video captions .

Coming Soon : Learn how to generate and translate captions automatically in your editor ГўВҖВ” our full guide is on the way.

ГўВҶВ’ [View Exporting Audio Docs](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/js/create-video/overview-b06512/?ref=img.ly#exporting-audio)

## Improvements

Smarter Video Timeline Controls

Editing clips is now smoother and more intuitive: Users can drag to select multiple clips, click the background to deselect, and scroll with the middle mouse button for precise navigation.

These enhancements make working on complex timelines faster and more fluid.

## Enhanced Developer Experience

### Build Multi-Language Editors with Locales List

With cesdk.i18n.listLocales() , web developers can now easily retrieve available locales, making it easy to build multi-language editors for global products.  ГўВҶВ’ [View Localization Docs](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/js/user-interface/localization-508e20?ref=img.ly)

### Build Custom Workflows with Actions List

Web developers can list all registered actions with cesdk.actions.list() . This makes it easier to build custom workflows.  ГўВҶВ’ [View Actions Docs](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/js/actions-6ch24x/?ref=img.ly#discovering-registered-actions)

### Evaluate CE.SDK without a License Key

Quickly prototype, test, or demo CE.SDK without setup friction ГўВҖВ” try out CE.SDK without a license (includes watermark).

# CE.SDK v1.63 Release Notes

Video editing comes to Safari on macOS, the web editor gets a built-in color picker, and a new Audio Export Guide helps you auto-generate captions and translations.

[Nes Dogan](https://img.ly/blog/author/neslihan/)

#### On this Page

This release makes creative workflows smoother across every platform.  Users on macOS can now edit videos directly in Safari . Additionally, the web editor gets a new built-in color picker for faster color selection. On mobile, creators can now edit grouped elements and use ready-made font combinations to design faster and stay on brand.

LetГўВҖВҷs dive in!

## Bring Powerful Video Editing to Safari Users

CE.SDK now supports  playback and editing video in Safari 26.0 and higher on macOS. Give your users on Mac full access to pristine, browser-based video editing.

This update lets your users create, animate, preview, and edit videos directly in Safari with the same CE.SDK features they already know from Chrome and Microsoft Edge.

For your product, this means broader reach and platform consistency, enabling you to deliver a pristine editing experience that feels native everywhere.

ГўВҶВ’ [Try the video demo in Safari](https://img.ly/showcases/cesdk/video-ui/web?ref=img.ly)  ГўВҶВ’ [Explore CE.SDKГўВҖВҷs video capabilities](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/js/overview-7d12d5/?ref=img.ly)

## Use A Color Picker Inside Your Editor

Users can now sample colors from anywhere on their screen and apply them directly in the web editor with the new built-in color picker.

ItГўВҖВҷs a fast, intuitive way to match brand colors or grab inspiration without typing in hex codes or switching tools. Supported in Chrome, Edge, and Opera for Web.

## Improvements

### Edit Groups in Videos on Mobile

Scenes that include grouped elements can now be uploaded into the Mobile Video Editor, allowing users to move and edit groups and ungroup the elements when needed.

While group creation itself is not yet available on mobile, this update brings better parity with the web editor and a more efficient editing workflow on smaller screens.

See a great example for editing groups next:

### Use Font Combinations for Videos on Mobile

Asset sources in the Mobile Video Editor now support font combinations  for Video on iOS and Android.

For your product, this means faster user activation and higher content output. Presets help new users create great-looking designs instantly, while giving brands a consistent, on-trend look.

### Select & Resize with Precision

Working with small or zoomed-out elements is now more precise across platforms. Resize handles remain visible even on tiny elements or at low zoom levels, ensuring users can always resize . This improves control and precision in dense designs and complex layouts, keeping editing predictable at any zoom level.

## Enhanced Developer Experience

WeГўВҖВҷve added new resources to help developers create richer, more flexible experiences with CE.SDK.

### Generate Captions, Translations and Effects with Audio Export

Our new Audio Export Guide shows how to extract audio directly from scenes or blocks to create auto captions, translations, and automated transcripts. Or process audio externally for creative effects!

This makes it easier to extend CE.SDK beyond editing, helping you power smarter, more accessible, and more engaging media tools.

ГўВҶВ’ [Read the Audio Export Guide](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/js/guides/export-save-publish/export/audio-68de25?ref=img.ly)

## Full Changelog

See all technical details, including breaking changes, in the [v1.63 Changelog](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/changelog/v1-63-0/?ref=img.ly) .

# CE.SDK v1.64 Release Notes

Export at scale with CE.SDK Renderer, edit video speed in the web editor, enforce image ratios on mobile, and more.

[Nes Dogan](https://img.ly/blog/author/neslihan/)

#### On this Page

This release brings powerful new automation capabilities with CE.SDK Renderer, letting you export media at scale on your backend. Your users also gain more creative control with video speed editing.

LetГўВҖВҷs dive in!

## Scale Your Exports with CE.SDK Renderer

We are excited to introduce a new platform : CE.SDK Renderer brings production grade exporting to your backend, allowing you to turn CE.SDK templates into finished media with the speed, consistency, and scale required for modern creative automation.

Running the CE.SDK engine natively on your server, the Renderer delivers fast and reliable export of images, PDFs, and fully compliant H.264 and H.265 videos. It removes the limitations of browser and Node based exporting and enables automated, personalized, and high volume content workflows.

Packaged as a ready-to-run Docker container, CE.SDK Renderer supports GPU acceleration, batch processing, and predictable output fidelity for enterprise production needs.

Perfect For Your Use Case  CE.SDK Renderer is ideal for dynamic ad creation, personalized video variations, template driven print assets such as postcards or brochures, and large scale automated content generation across marketing, e-commerce, and creative automation platforms.

ГўВҶВ’ Explore deep-dive into [CE.SDK Renderer](https://img.ly/blog/ce-sdk-renderer-creative-automation/)  ГўВҶВ’ [View CE.SDK Renderer Documentation](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/renderer/cesdk-renderer-overview-7f3e9a/?ref=img.ly)

## Change Video Speed for Fun Video Editing

Your users can now change video speed right in the web editor. Slow clips down to spotlight important moments, or speed them up to keep content tight and engaging.

This removes the need for external editing apps and keeps more creation inside your product.

ГўВҶВ’ [View Payback Speed Documentation](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/js/create-video/control-daba54/?ref=img.ly#playback-speed)

## Enforce Image Ratios on Mobile

Force Crop is now available for Mobile, as seen for the [Web](https://img.ly/showcases/cesdk/force-crop/web?ref=img.ly) editor: Force Crop ensures that images and videos always follow the aspect ratio your template requires.  If a user uploads media that does not fit the intended layout, the editor automatically crops or guides them through cropping, so the final design looks exactly as intended.

It is especially valuable for social stories, ads, marketplace listings, and any workflow where the output size must be precise.

Force Crop supports three modes so you can choose how much control you give users:

- silentApplies the crop automatically without showing the crop UI.
- alwaysApplies the preset and always opens crop mode, so users can review and adjust.
- ifNeededOnly opens the crop UI when the media does not match the required ratio.

ГўВҶВ’ [View Android Force Crop Documentation](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/android/user-interface/customization/force-crop-c2854e/?ref=img.ly)   ГўВҶВ’ [View iOS Force Crop Documentation](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/ios/user-interface/customization/force-crop-c2854e/?ref=img.ly)

## Customize Your Canvas Menu

When selecting any element, the canvas menu appears and contains a ГўВҖВңmore optionsГўВҖВқ drown-down section. It is now fully customizable using the builder API.

You can add, remove, or reorder menu items and include individual actions (flip, copy, paste, etc.).

Get more control over the editor UI, and tailor tools and workflows to your usersГўВҖВҷ needs.

ГўВҶВ’ [Change Canvas Menu Order Documentation](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/js/api/cesdk-js/classes/userinterfaceapi/?ref=img.ly#updatecanvasmenuordercomponent)  ГўВҶВ’ [Explore Canvas Menu Documentation](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/js/user-interface/customization/canvas-menu-0d2b5b/?ref=img.ly)

## Enhanced Developer Experience

### Evaluate CE.SDK Without A License

CE.SDK now allows a null license value, enabling developers to run the editor in evaluation mode more easily.

This simplifies your demo setups, prototyping, and onboarding new developers. No license token is needed during early development stages.

Applies to: Web, iOS, Android, Flutter, React Native. Includes a watermark.

## Improvements

Confirm Edits with Enter  Number and text fields in the Web editor now update only when users press Enter or click away. This helps prevent little mistakes and makes editing feel calmer and more intentional.

## Full Changelog

See all technical details, including breaking changes, in the [v1.64 Changelog](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/changelog/v1-64-0/?ref=img.ly) .

# CE.SDK v1.65 Release Notes

A new Product Editor live for you to try and quality-of-life improvements that make editing smoother and prepare CE.SDK for what's next.

[Nes Dogan](https://img.ly/blog/author/neslihan/)

#### On this Page

This release adds a fresh Product Editor demo and a set of quality improvements that make editing smoother and more intuitive. CE.SDK v1.65 introduces under-the-hood enhancements that set the stage for powerful features coming in the next releases.

LetГўВҖВҷs dive in!

## Power Product Customization with CE.SDK

Let your users design products like apparel, mugs, phone cases, and more with a real-time, fully interactive product editor made with CE.SDK.

The Web Product Editor UI demo shows how CE.SDK handles multiple print areas, live mockups, and print-ready design exports in a streamlined workflow.

For your product, this provides a ready-made blueprint for building custom merchandise editors, print-on-demand tools, or any e-commerce customization experience.  ГўВҶВ’ [Try the Product Editor UI Demo](https://img.ly/showcases/cesdk/product-editor-ui/web?utm_source=releasenotes)

## Improvements

### Fine-Tune Text Styling Without Selecting

When users apply styling without selecting text, CE.SDK now updates the entire text block instead of applying the style only to future characters.

This feels more predictable and matches user expectations in formatting-heavy workflows.

### Make Your Libraries Searchable or Not

Asset library entries can now declare whether they are searchable using the isSearchable field.

The search bar appears only when at least one visible entry supports search, keeping the interface clean and context-aware. # CE.SDK v1.66 Release Notes

Build truly multilingual designs with native right-to-left text support in CE.SDK.

[Nes Dogan](https://img.ly/blog/author/neslihan/)

#### On this Page

This release expands CE.SDKГўВҖВҷs global reach with native support for right-to-left text. Users can now type and edit naturally in languages like Arabic, Hebrew, and Persian, while products benefit from cleaner multilingual workflows.

LetГўВҖВҷs dive in!

## Support Right-to-Left Languages Out of the Box

CE.SDK now fully supports right-to-left (RTL) text input , making it easy to build editors for languages like Arabic, Hebrew, and Persian (Farsi).

Text direction switches automatically, characters flow correctly, and cursor movement behaves as users expect when typing and editing.

For your users, this means a natural, native text editing experience in their language. We are excited to see fully international, beautiful templates!

For your product, it removes the need for custom workarounds and unlocks  multilingual templates and global-ready creative workflows.  ГўВҶВ’ [Explore Text & Language Support Documentation](https://img.ly/docs/cesdk/sveltekit/text/language-support-a0f010/?ref=img.ly)

## Improvements

### Use Transparent WebM Videos for Rich Motion Design

CE.SDK for Web now supports transparent WebM videos , making it easy to layer animations, overlays, and motion elements without a background.  This opens up new creative possibilities for effects, lower thirds, UI animations, and branded motion content directly in the editor.
